result: Task completed successfully. The cleaned harmonised educational qualification dataset has been created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 9408 records and 5 variables: NSID, educ25, educ32, educadtl32, educvdtl32. All required data processing steps were executed: loaded 4 input tab-delimited files, merged using full_join by NSID, derived 4 educational qualification variables with proper NVQ level mapping and label extraction, and wrote the final CSV output.
